title: SecretStore::get() for K8sBackend
description:
What: Implement async get() and refresh() on K8sBackend, fetching a Kubernetes Secret object and returning the value for the configured key as a SecretValue. Register with inventory::submit! for BackendRegistration.

Algorithm:
1. In get(&self) -> Result<SecretValue, SecretError>:
   a. let client = self.client.get_or_try_init(|| async { build_client().await }).await?.clone()
   b. let api: Api<k8s_openapi::api::core::v1::Secret> = Api::namespaced(client, &self.namespace)
   c. Match api.get(&self.name).await:
      - Err(kube::Error::Api(s)) if s.code == Some(404) -> return Err(SecretError::NotFound)
      - Err(kube::Error::Auth(_)) -> return Err(SecretError::Unavailable { backend: "k8s", source: ... })
      - Err(kube::Error::Api(s)) if matches!(s.code, Some(500..=599) | Some(429)) -> Unavailable
      - Err(e) -> Backend { backend: "k8s", source: Box::new(e) }
      - Ok(secret) -> secret
   d. let data = secret.data.ok_or(SecretError::NotFound)?  // Secret exists but has no .data
   e. If self.key is Some(k):
      - let bs = data.get(k.as_str()).ok_or(SecretError::NotFound)?
      - let bytes: Zeroizing<Vec<u8>> = Zeroizing::new(bs.0.clone())
      - drop(data); // release non-zeroized map
      - return Ok(SecretValue::new(bytes.into_inner()))
   f. If self.key is None:
      - If data.len() == 0 -> return Err(SecretError::NotFound)
      - If data.len() > 1 -> return Err(SecretError::InvalidUri("Secret has multiple keys; add ?key=<name> to select one".into()))
      - let (_, bs) = data.into_iter().next().unwrap(); // single entry, unreachable to panic
      - return Ok(SecretValue::new(bs.0))  // bs.0 is Vec<u8>, already decoded
2. refresh() delegates to get()
3. At module level: inventory::submit!(secretx_core::BackendRegistration { name: "k8s", factory: |uri| K8sBackend::from_uri(uri).map(|b| Arc::new(b) as Arc<dyn SecretStore>) })

Defensive programming rules:
- Never log secret bytes — log only &self.namespace, &self.name, &self.key.
- Copy ByteString bytes into Zeroizing<Vec<u8>> before dropping the BTreeMap; ByteString does not implement Zeroize.
- The single-entry unwrap() in step (f) is unreachable after the len()==1 check; document with comment.
- All error paths must use specific variants: NotFound vs Unavailable vs Backend.
- No unwrap() without explaining-why comment.

Subagent instructions: Spawn research subagent to read the kube crate error types source before writing the match arm. Spawn validation subagent to run cargo test -p secretx-k8s after implementation.

Tests (via W3A bead — this bead need not add them, but must not break existing from_uri tests):
- get() with single-key secret returns correct bytes
- get() with multi-key + ?key= returns correct key value
- get() with multi-key + no ?key= returns SecretError::InvalidUri
- get() when Secret not found returns SecretError::NotFound
- get() when .data is None returns SecretError::NotFound
